name: Ravi Sharma
text: Got our modular kitchen done from VS Furnitures. Quality of ply and fittings is excellent. Soft-close shutters still working perfectly after 2 years. Highly recommend.

name: Amit Tiwari
text: We got our entire flat furnished — kitchen, two wardrobes, TV unit, and beds. One team handled everything. No hassle, no running around. Very satisfied.

name: Sunita Verma
text: Called them for polishing my old dining table and chairs. They came the same day and the result was amazing. Looks brand new. 10% off on first repair is a great offer.

name: Deepak Malviya
text: Got workstations and a reception counter made for my office on AB Road. Very professional work. They finished the whole thing in 12 days as promised.

name: Neha Chouhan
text: Best modular kitchen experience. They came for a free site visit, suggested a nice L-shaped layout for our small kitchen, and executed it perfectly. Very happy.

name: Kavita Joshi
text: Got a complete bedroom set — wardrobe, bed with storage, and dressing table. All matching finish. They coordinated everything together so nicely.

name: Vikram Agarwal
text: Got false ceiling and wood paneling done for my living room. The room looks completely transformed. Clean work, no mess left behind.

name: Suresh Yadav
text: My grandfather's old wooden almirah was in bad shape. They restored it beautifully — repaired the joints, polished it, and it looks like an antique showpiece now.

name: Lalita Verma
text: The free site visit was very helpful. They suggested changes to my original plan that saved space and money. Kitchen turned out better than I imagined.

name: Pooja Dubey
text: We shifted homes and needed all furniture dismantled and reassembled at the new place. They were on time, careful with everything, and put it all back perfectly.
